svg.text: Consumes events (req.opened, candidate.applied, hire.started, review.cycle, policy.question) → routes → self-verifies (bias-checked, job-relevant) → drafts & queues for a human decision → writes agent_runs + audit_log · NEVER auto-decides people matters

svg.text: SELF-VERIFICATION JUDGE (before every output — no people decision is ever automated)

“Is this bias-checked & job-relevant? Free of protected-characteristic inference? Is this a consequential matter a human must decide?” → PASS: draft & queue for human decision · FAIL: regenerate · escalate

svg.text: ① MCP-first — every capability is a tool; the same tools power web, ATS/HRIS, Slack & email.
② Human decides — agents draft & assist; no consequential people decision is ever automated.
③ Bias-checked — screen on job-relevant signals; protected characteristics excluded; fairness tested.
④ Private by design — strict PII minimization, least access, consent & transparency.
⑤ Model tiering + caching → low cost; eval-gated, bias-tested reliability.
⑥ Everything audited — and people1 pairs with academy1 and powers the edu1 solution.
